data.current_description: Retrieve the settings related to the app's [channel connection](https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/guides/api/crm/extensions/third-party-calling#fetch-existing-channel-connection-settings).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the channel connection settings configured for the specified app. Returns the channel connection configuration including connection details and webhook settings. Requires the app ID as a path parameter.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and appropriate. Description relies heavily on external documentation link and lacks specificity about what is returned. Added clarity about return value structure, required parameters, and what configuration details are included to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'post-/crm/v3/extensions/calling/{appId}/settings/channel-connection_create' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but description is too brief and relies on external documentation. Added details about what inputs are expected, what is returned, and the operational effect (establishing connection). Clarifies this is a creation operation that returns the configured settings for AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Create and configure channel connection settings for the specified app. Accepts connection configuration details in the request body. Returns the created channel connection settings object with assigned identifiers. This operation establishes the connection between the app and the calling channel.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is too brief and relies on external documentation. Added details about what inputs are expected, what is returned, and the operational effect (establishing connection). Clarifies this is a creation operation that returns the configured settings for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'delete-/crm/v3/extensions/calling/{appId}/settings/channel-connection_archive' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description lacks important context about side effects. Added information about what happens after deletion (disconnection from calling channel) and the impact on app functionality. This helps AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

data.current_description: Delete the [channel connection settings](https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/guides/api/crm/extensions/third-party-calling#delete-existing-channel-connection-settings) for the app.
data.description_suggestion: Delete the channel connection settings for the specified app. This operation removes the channel connection configuration and disconnects the app from the calling channel. After deletion, the app will no longer be able to use the calling extension until new channel connection settings are configured.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks important context about side effects. Added information about what happens after deletion (disconnection from calling channel) and the impact on app functionality. This helps AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

data.current_description: Update existing [channel connection settings](https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/guides/api/crm/extensions/third-party-calling#manage-the-webhook-settings-for-channel-connection) for your app.
data.description_suggestion: Update existing channel connection settings for the specified app. Accepts partial updates to connection configuration in the request body. Only provided fields will be modified; omitted fields retain their current values. Returns the updated channel connection settings object.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is vague and relies on external documentation. Added clarity about partial update behavior (only provided fields are modified), what inputs are expected, and what is returned. data.current_summary: Enable the app for call recording
